What We Do

Services Built for the AI-First Era

End-to-end AI transformation — from strategy to deployment to team enablement.

🧠

AI Strategy Consulting

We assess your business, identify high-impact AI opportunities, and build a roadmap to becoming an agent-driven company.

  • ✓ Current-state AI audit
  • ✓ Opportunity mapping
  • ✓ 12-month roadmap
  • ✓ ROI projections
⚙️

Agent System Design

We design and build custom AI agent systems tailored to your workflows — from sales automation to ops intelligence.

  • ✓ Custom agent architecture
  • ✓ LLM integration
  • ✓ Workflow automation
  • ✓ API & tool connections
🎓

AI Team Training

Upskill your team to work effectively alongside AI agents — from prompting to managing agent pipelines.

  • ✓ Hands-on workshops
  • ✓ Prompt engineering
  • ✓ Agent management
  • ✓ Ongoing support

The Process

From Day One to Agent-Driven

A proven 4-phase framework to transform your company in 90 days.

01

Assess

Deep-dive into your business processes, tech stack, and team to identify the highest-leverage AI opportunities.

02

Design

Architect a custom AI agent system tailored to your workflows, tools, and business goals.

03

Build

Deploy your first AI agents, integrate with existing systems, and run pilot programs to validate results.

04

Scale

Expand AI agents across departments, train your team, and continuously optimize for maximum ROI.

👨‍💻
Rick Ren
Founder, DreamWise AI

About the Founder

Built by a Builder, for Builders

I'm Rick Ren — an Asian indie developer based in Shanghai building AI agent systems that actually work in the real world.

I started DreamWise AI after seeing too many companies spend millions on AI initiatives that delivered nothing. The problem wasn't the technology — it was the lack of a practical, implementation-first approach.

My mission is simple: help companies become agent-driven organizations — where AI agents handle the repetitive work, and humans focus on what only humans can do.

AI Agent SystemsLLM EngineeringBusiness AutomationTeam Training
